case_title: JOSE MARTINEZ VS. BUILDING SERVICES PLUS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SEE SERVICE - INFORMATION ALSO ENTERED IN SUBSTITUTED SERVICE FIELD. NO FEE FOR SERVICE. SERVED SEP-19-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BUILDING SERVICES PLUS DBA AMPEX  JANITORIAL SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JOSE MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BUILDING SERVICES PLUS DBA AMPEX JANITORIAL SERVICES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-23-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,621.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT BUILDING SERVICES PLUS DBA AMPEX  JANITORIAL SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUILDING SERVICES PLUS DBA AMPEX  JANITORIAL SERVICES $3,102.66 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,177.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
